invariant: BF4 — feature must not break an existing AC (scoped regression guard)
seed: (result of running VERIFY-OUTPUT on the regressed tree) = defects/regression/verify-output.regression-red.json → .build/slices/S5/verify-output.json
load_bearing_assertion: VERIFY-OUTPUT verdict == 'rejected' (regression layer RED on AC6). Golden verdict == 'verified' (regression green).
separates_from_golden_by: regression.verdict (green in golden / red here) — the REAL invariant under test, not a cosmetic difference.
